name: Duck Chess
author: AGP
description: Tim Paulden's 2016 variant: standard chess plus a shared rubber duck. Each turn you make a normal chess move, then MUST move the duck to a different empty square — nothing may land on or slide through it (knights jump over). There is no check: win by actually capturing the enemy king, and a player left with no move at all is 'fowled' and WINS. White (player 0) moves first; the duck enters the board after White's first move.
